title: King’s Speech Comes at an Awkward Time for Starmer
summary_full: King Charles III read out Keir Starmer’s legislative agenda in the traditional manner, even as the British prime minister’s leadership remained under pressure.
summary_public: King Charles III read out Keir Starmer’s legislative agenda in the traditional manner, even as the British prime minister’s leadership remained under pressure.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: British prime minister’s leadership remained under pressure
